## 🛠️ **Yang Gue Bisa Langsung Lakukan:**

### ✅ **Full Development Pipeline:**
```
📝 Tulis kode Java/Kotlin
    ↓
📁 Bikin project structure
    ↓
⚙️ Setup build.gradle
    ↓
🔨 Compile & Build APK
    ↓
📱 Install langsung ke HP lo
```

| Tahap | Tool | Status |
|---|---|---|

3. **Skill sudah ter-index** → Gue tinggal referensikan

# Gak Persis Copy-Paste Sih 🤔

Lebih tepatnya kayak **"Riset + Tulis Ulang"**

## 🔄 Cara Kerja RAG:

```
Lo nanya: "Bikin camera app yang bisa zoom"
          ↓
Step 1: SEARCH 🔍
   Gue cari di 515 chunks:
   → CameraX setup (relevan ✅)
   → Zoom implementation (relevan ✅)
   → QR scanner (gak relevan ❌ skip)
          ↓
Step 2: AMBIL YANG RELEVAN 📋
   → Ambil snippet CameraX
   → Ambil snippet Zoom
          ↓
Step 3: TULIS ULANG SESUAI PERTANYAAN ✍️
   → Gue GABUNGKAN & SESUAIKAN
   → Bukan copy-paste mentah
   → Gue tambahi konteks sesuai pertanyaan lo
```

## 📊 Bedanya:

| | Copy-Paste | RAG + Tulis Ulang |
|---|---|---|
| **Cara** | Tempel mentah | Ambil → Gabung → Tulis ulang |
| **Kualitas** | Kadang gak nyambung | Selalu relevan |
| **Fleksibilitas** | Kaku | Bisa disesuaikan |
| **Konteks** | Gak ada | Sesuai pertanyaan lo |
| **Contoh** | "Ini kode CameraX" (mentah) | "Karena lo mau zoom, ini pakai CameraX + ZoomGesture..." |

## 🍳 Analogi Masak:

```
❌ Copy-Paste = Lo suruh pelayan ambil makanan dari dapur
   → Piring mentah, gak di-plating

✅ RAG = Lo suruh koki masak
   → Koki ambil bahan dari dapur (search)
   → Koki masak & olah (tulis ulang)
   → Disajikan sesuai selera lo (konteks pertanyaan)
```

## 💡 Jadi Intinya:

```
RAG = Search → Ambil Referensi → Tulis Ulang → Jawaban Relevan

BUKAN = Search → Copy → Paste → Selesai
```

Gue **tetep mikir & nulis** cuma berdasarkan **referensi yang udah ada**, bukan dari nol total. 🧠

{"content": "import os, sys, json, time
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.service import Service
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

class Browser:
    """Headless browser automation via Selenium + Chromium."""
    
    def __init__(self, headless=True):
        opts = Options()
        if headless:
            opts.add_argument('--headless')
        opts.add_argument('--no-sandbox')
        opts.add_argument('--disable-dev-shm-usage')
        opts.add_argument('--disable-gpu')
        
        chromedriver_path = '/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/chromedriver'
        service = Service(chromedriver_path)
        self.driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=opts)
        self.wait = WebDriverWait(self.driver, 10)
    
    def goto(self, url):
        self.driver.get(url)
        return self
    
    def click(self, selector, by=By.CSS_SELECTOR):
        el = self.wait.until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((by, selector)))
        el.click()
        return self
    
    def type(self, selector, text, by=By.CSS_SELECTOR):
        el = self.wait.until(EC.presence_of_element_located((by, selector)))
        el.clear()
        el.send_keys(text)
        return self
    
    def press_enter(self, selector, by=By.CSS_SELECTOR):
        el = self.driver.find_element(by, selector)
        el.send_keys(Keys.ENTER)
        return self
    
    def get_text(self, selector, by=By.CSS_SELECTOR):
        el = self.driver.find_element(by, selector)
        return el.text
    
    def get_all_text(self, selector, by=By.CSS_SELECTOR):
        els = self.driver.find_elements(by, selector)
        return [el.text for el in els]
    
    def screenshot(self, path="screenshot.png"):
        self.driver.save_screenshot(path)
        return self
    
    def js(self, script):
        return self.driver.execute_script(script)
    
    def wait_for(self, selector, by=By.CSS_SELECTOR, timeout=10):
        WebDriverWait(self.driver, timeout).until(
            EC.presence_of_element_located((by, selector))
        )
        return self
    
    @property
    def title(self):
        return self.driver.title
    
    @property
    def source(self):
        return self.driver.page_source
    
    def close(self):
        self.driver.quit()

# Quick test

    b.goto("https://example.com")
    print(f"✅ Title: {b.title}")
    print(f"✅ H1: {b.get_text('h1')}")
    b.close()
    print("✅ Browser automation ready!")
